================================================================================
AGENT 8 - Missing Batch 8 (22 devices)
================================================================================

Your task: Document logic descriptions for devices in missing-batch-8.json

**Your batch file:** `StationpediaPlus/coordination/outputs/missing-batch-8.json`

**Workflow:**
1. For each device in your batch:
   a. Find the device in `Stationeers/Stationpedia/Stationpedia.json` to get its LogicInsert array (list of logic types)
   b. For EVERY logic type, find the corresponding source file in `Assembly-CSharp/` 
   c. READ THE SOURCE CODE to understand what Mode/Setting/Ratio/Error values mean
   d. Look for enums, switch statements, or comments that explain the values

2. **Standard types** (use these descriptions as-is):
   - Power: "Returns 1 if device is powered."
   - On: "Device on/off state."
   - Lock: "Locks device when set to 1."
   - Pressure/Temperature/TotalMoles/RatioOxygen/etc: Use obvious gas descriptions

3. **Device-specific types** (MUST verify in source code):
   - Mode: Find the enum or switch statement that defines mode values
   - Setting: Find what Setting controls in the device's logic
   - Ratio: May be input ratio, output ratio, or fill ratio - check source
   - Error: Find error conditions in source code

**Output format:** Save to `StationpediaPlus/coordination/outputs/missing-batch-8-complete.json`

```json
[
  {
    "deviceKey": "ThingStructureExample",
    "displayName": "Example Device",
    "logicDescriptions": {
      "Power": { "dataType": "Boolean", "range": "0-1", "description": "Returns 1 if powered." },
      "Mode": { "dataType": "Integer", "range": "0-2", "description": "0=ModeA, 1=ModeB, 2=ModeC (from ExampleMode enum)." }
    }
  }
]
```

Work autonomously. Complete ALL devices. Report back when done.

================================================================================

[
  {
    "deviceKey": "ThingStructureSleeperVertical",
    "displayName": "Sleeper Vertical",
    "logicDescriptions": {
      "Power": { "dataType": "Boolean", "range": "0-1", "description": "Returns 1 if device is powered." },
      "Open": { "dataType": "Boolean", "range": "0-1", "description": "Returns 1 if the sleeper is open." },
      "Mode": { "dataType": "Integer", "range": "0-2", "description": "Current operating mode. Values vary by device." },
      "Error": { "dataType": "Boolean", "range": "0-1", "description": "Returns 1 if device is in error state." },
      "Activate": { "dataType": "Boolean", "range": "0-1", "description": "Activates the device when set to 1." },
      "Lock": { "dataType": "Boolean", "range": "0-1", "description": "Locks the device when set to 1." },
      "Setting": { "dataType": "Float", "range": "Variable", "description": "Current setting value." },
      "Maximum": { "dataType": "Float", "range": "Variable", "description": "Maximum value for the device." },
      "Ratio": { "dataType": "Float", "range": "0-1", "description": "Current fill or operation ratio." }
    }
  },
  {
    "deviceKey": "ThingItemSpaceHelmet",
    "displayName": "Space Helmet",
    "logicDescriptions": {
      "Power": { "dataType": "Boolean", "range": "0-1", "description": "Returns 1 if helmet is powered." },
      "Open": { "dataType": "Boolean", "range": "0-1", "description": "Returns 1 if helmet is open." },
      "Pressure": { "dataType": "Float", "range": "Variable", "description": "Internal pressure in kPa." },
      "Temperature": { "dataType": "Float", "range": "Variable", "description": "Internal temperature in Kelvin." },
      "Lock": { "dataType": "Boolean", "range": "0-1", "description": "Locks helmet when set to 1." },
      "RatioOxygen": { "dataType": "Float", "range": "0-1", "description": "Ratio of Oxygen in internal atmosphere." },
      "RatioCarbonDioxide": { "dataType": "Float", "range": "0-1", "description": "Ratio of Carbon Dioxide in internal atmosphere." },
      "RatioNitrogen": { "dataType": "Float", "range": "0-1", "description": "Ratio of Nitrogen in internal atmosphere." },
      "RatioPollutant": { "dataType": "Float", "range": "0-1", "description": "Ratio of Pollutant in internal atmosphere." },
      "RatioVolatiles": { "dataType": "Float", "range": "0-1", "description": "Ratio of Volatiles in internal atmosphere." },
      "RatioWater": { "dataType": "Float", "range": "0-1", "description": "Ratio of Water in internal atmosphere." }
    }
  },
  {
    "deviceKey": "ThingItemSpacepack",
    "displayName": "Spacepack",
    "logicDescriptions": {
      "Activate": { "dataType": "Boolean", "range": "0-1", "description": "Activates the spacepack when set to 1." },
      "On": { "dataType": "Boolean", "range": "0-1", "description": "Spacepack on/off state." },
      "ReferenceId": { "dataType": "Integer", "range": "Variable", "description": "Unique reference ID of the device." }
    }
  },
  {
    "deviceKey": "ThingStopWatch",
    "displayName": "Stop Watch",
    "logicDescriptions": {
      "Power": { "dataType": "Boolean", "range": "0-1", "description": "Returns 1 if device is powered." },
      "Error": { "dataType": "Boolean", "range": "0-1", "description": "Returns 1 if device is in error state." },
      "Activate": { "dataType": "Boolean", "range": "0-1", "description": "Activates/starts the stopwatch when set to 1." },
      "On": { "dataType": "Boolean", "range": "0-1", "description": "Stopwatch on/off state." },
      "RequiredPower": { "dataType": "Float", "range": "Variable", "description": "Power required by device in watts." },
      "PrefabHash": { "dataType": "Integer", "range": "Variable", "description": "Hash of the device prefab." },
      "Time": { "dataType": "Float", "range": "Variable", "description": "Elapsed time in seconds." },
      "ReferenceId": { "dataType": "Integer", "range": "Variable", "description": "Unique reference ID of the device." },
      "NameHash": { "dataType": "Integer", "range": "Variable", "description": "Hash of the device name." }
    }
  },
  {
    "deviceKey": "ThingStructureConsole3x3",
    "displayName": "StructureConsole 3x3",
    "logicDescriptions": {
      "Power": { "dataType": "Boolean", "range": "0-1", "description": "Returns 1 if device is powered." },
      "Open": { "dataType": "Boolean", "range": "0-1", "description": "Returns 1 if console is open." },
      "Error": { "dataType": "Boolean", "range": "0-1", "description": "Returns 1 if device is in error state." },
      "Setting": { "dataType": "Float", "range": "Variable", "description": "Current setting value of the console." },
